param_input_item.param_description: a class name as a string, including package-qualified names

description.p: metaclass returns metadata for a classdef class.
?ClassName is accepted as MATLAB-compatible shorthand for metaclass('ClassName'), including package-qualified class names.
The returned structure contains Name, SuperclassList, PropertyList, MethodList, EventList, and EnumerationMemberList.
ClassDetails reports raw class attributes and derived flags such as Abstract, Sealed, and Handle.

For classdef classes, PropertyDetails, MethodDetails, EventDetails, and EnumerationDetails expose Nelson metadata structures for common MATLAB attributes such as access, static methods, hidden or sealed methods, constant, dependent, and observable properties. Property and method details also include an Attributes cell array with the raw block attributes. This is a compatibility layer, not yet a full matlab.metadata object implementation.
